_instructions: Edit this file to update the documentary page. Change video_url to a YouTube embed URL (e.g. https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID) or a Vimeo embed URL. Set show_placeholder to false once you have a real video. See HOW-TO-UPDATE.md.

featured_video.title: Born in Silk: The Story of Silora Orient
featured_video.title_zh: 丝绸中诞生：Silora Orient 的故事
featured_video.description: From a university friendship to a silk flower workshop in China, through five years of craft, to a spring afternoon in New York — a Spanish pianist comes to order cherry blossom earrings. We look up, see her eyes, and make something else entirely. That unplanned piece is where Silora Orient truly begins.
featured_video.description_zh: 从大学里的一段友谊，到中国的一间丝绸花坊，经过五年的手工打磨，再到纽约春日的一个午后——一位西班牙钢琴家来订樱花色耳饰。我们抬头，看见了她的眼睛，做了一枚完全不同的作品。那枚从未在计划里的耳饰，是 Silora Orient 真正的开始。

clips.title: Inside the Studio: Five Years of 缠花
clips.title_zh: 工作室内部：五年的缠花工艺
clips.description: A look inside the Chinese silk flower workshop — the silk, the wire, the patience.
clips.description_zh: 走进中国丝绸花坊——丝线、金丝，以及那份无法省略的耐心。

clips.title: Spring in New York: The First Day
clips.description: The flowers arrive in New York. A city, a suitcase, and the beginning of something new.
clips.description_zh: 花朵抵达纽约。一座城市，一只行李箱，和某件新事物的开始。

clips.title: How a Silk Flower Is Made
clips.title_zh: 一朵丝绸花是如何制作的
clips.description: Silk thread, gold wire, pearl. A time-lapse of one piece from start to finish.
clips.description_zh: 丝线、金丝、珍珠。从开始到完成，一枚作品的延时摄影。
